items.name: OV-1B "Auxiliary" Helmet
items.description:
Potentially one of the most impactful iterations of OV-1, this armor set in particular has been adopted by a multitude of medical teams, and combat medics around the globe for it's reliability, and effectiveness in being able to evacuate patients while under fire. It features an advanced surgical kit, and other life saving equipment. 

OV-1B "Auxiliary" Set: https://www.roblox.com/catalog/17211247379/OV-1-Armor - https://www.roblox.com/catalog/17211252968/OV-1-Armor-R6-Female - https://www.roblox.com/catalog/17211561591/OV-1B-Auxiliary-Helmet - https://www.roblox.com/catalog/17211265315/OV-1B-Auxiliary-Kit - https://www.roblox.com/catalog/17211306348/OV-1B-Auxiliary-Belt - https://www.roblox.com/catalog/17211502569/OV-1B-Auxiliary-Right-Pauldron - https://www.roblox.com/catalog/17211506635/OV-1B-Auxiliary-Left-Pauldron

items.name: Green OV-1C "Marksman" Goggles
items.description:
OV-1 "C" Variant offers an upgraded sensor package, with a direct uplink to command modules assigned to you. Essentially, whatever you see, can be instantly uploaded to your team leader, or command element with a push of a button. However it is not recommended to travel alone with this system, as it is incredibly expensive...

items.name: The Overlord's Testament
items.description: Etched from shadow, reflecting the Overlord's formidable might, this obsidian relic is one amongst just fifteen. These rare trophies were claimed only by those daring enough to traverse every inch of Shadowed Sanctuary ( https://www.roblox.com/games/13972817563/R6-OUTFITS-Shadowed-Sanctuary ). Venturing through each cryptic chapter, they unveiled secrets as numerous as stars in the night sky. At journey's end, the code was cracked, and this trophy was their hard-earned reward. Will you dare to join these select few, to seek and unearth the mystery that awaits?
